name: cashsnap_two_stage_balanced_real_p24_trueempty_proposal_gate_browser_stack

evidence.summary: Balanced real p24 detector plus true-empty gate at reject>=0.99 is the older conservative product clue. On full real test, the gate cuts background-FP images 151 -> 79 and raises exact-value images 1133 -> 1209 while preserving recall 0.9498 -> 0.9486. The threshold sweep in runs/cashsnap/product_threshold_sweep_v1 now favors the reject>=0.80 tuned config as the current browser-deployable product operating point. The old denomination reclassifier lowers exact-value to 1184 for this detector, so keep the stack as detector plus gate unless a better reclassifier is proven.

known_limits: Diagnostic stack only; not production-ready and not overlap/fan/hand capable.
Full real val/test still contains mixed-source, empty-label, KHR_100, and cross-split issues documented in real_data_label_audit_v1.
Current 13-class schema cannot encode KHR_100 or other out-of-scope banknotes.
Reject>=0.99 is the historical conservative operating point; see the rej080 config for the current tuned count/value trade.
The gate rejects proposals but does not correct denomination classes.
